# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Initialize an access control creation flags object.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: CFOptionFlags)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: The logical `OR` of one or more of the defined access flags values.
title: init(rawValue:)
